description: Self-service appointment scheduling with availability slot management, email verification, agent assignment, and calendar event integration.

actors.name: Visitor
actors.description: External person booking an appointment via the public form

actors.name: Agent
actors.description: Internal team member assigned to handle the appointment

actors.name: System
actors.description: Validates availability, sends verification emails, assigns agents, creates calendar events

validation.message: Must be a valid email address
Must allow at least 1 day advance booking
Duration must be at least 1 minute
At least one agent is required

values.name: Unverified
values.description: Appointment created by unknown visitor, awaiting email verification

values.name: Open
values.description: Appointment verified and confirmed, agent assigned

transitions.description: Visitor confirms email via verification link
Agent closes the appointment after completion or cancellation

slot_availability_enforcement.description: Before creating an appointment, the system checks that the requested time slot is available. The maximum concurrent appointments per slot is limited by the number_of_agents setting.

email_verification_flow.description: Appointments from unknown visitors (no existing lead/customer match) start in Unverified status. A verification email is sent and the appointment is only promoted to Open after confirmation.

auto_create_lead.description: When a verified appointment has no matching lead or customer, a new Lead record is automatically created from the visitor's details.

agent_assignment.description: Agents are auto-assigned based on the latest opportunity owner for the party, or by least current workload if no prior relationship exists.

calendar_event_creation.description: A calendar event is created with both the party and the assigned agent/employee as participants upon appointment confirmation.

availability_time_validation.description: Availability slot from_time must be earlier than to_time. Slots cannot overlap within the same day of the week.

slot_duration_divisibility.description: Each availability slot duration must be evenly divisible by the appointment_duration setting to avoid partial time blocks.

holiday_exclusion.description: Dates in the configured holiday list are excluded from available booking dates. Visitors cannot book on holidays.

given: visitor provides name, email, and desired time

then.description: Appointment created in Unverified or Open status

create_appointment.result: Appointment is created and queued for verification if visitor is unknown

given: visitor clicks the email verification link
verify_email.result: Appointment is verified and promoted to Open status

given: agent list is configured in settings

then.description: Assign agent based on prior relationship or least workload

assign_agent.result: Agent is assigned to handle the appointment

then.description: Calendar event with party and agent as participants
Link calendar event reference to appointment

create_calendar_event.result: Calendar event created with all participants notified

given: visitor selects an available date and time
slot has fewer current bookings than number_of_agents
book_slot.result: Time slot is reserved for the appointment

cancel_appointment.result: Appointment is cancelled and calendar event removed

given: requested time slot has no remaining agent capacity
slot_unavailable.result: Booking blocked — no available agents for the requested slot

given: verification token is invalid or expired

then.description: Prompt visitor to request a new verification email

verification_failed.result: Email verification failed — token invalid or expired

given: availability slot duration is not evenly divisible by appointment_duration

then.description: Show that slot duration must be a multiple of appointment duration

slot_duration_invalid.result: Settings rejected — slot duration must be divisible by appointment duration

given: availability slot from_time is not earlier than to_time

then.description: Show that from_time must be before to_time

slot_time_invalid.result: Settings rejected — from_time must be earlier than to_time

given: reminder send time has been reached

then.description: Send appointment reminder to visitor and agent

send_reminder.result: Reminder email sent to both visitor and assigned agent

errors.message: The requested time slot is fully booked. Please choose a different time.
Email verification failed. The link may have expired. Please request a new verification email.
Availability slot duration must be evenly divisible by the appointment duration setting.
Availability slot start time must be earlier than end time.

events.name: appointment.verified
events.description: Visitor confirmed email and appointment is active

events.name: appointment.agent_assigned
events.description: Agent assigned to handle the appointment

events.name: appointment.reminder_sent
events.description: Reminder email sent before the appointment

related.reason: Verified appointments auto-create leads for unknown visitors
Appointments may be linked to existing customer records

goals.description: Self-service appointment scheduling with availability slot management, email verification, agent assignment, and calendar event integration.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Failed operations divided by total attempts

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: CRM data quality directly impacts customer relationship decisions
